caption: This news broadcast segment features a graphic display regarding political developments in Bihar. The screen displays a layout with multiple portraits: Nitish Kumar on the left, and Santosh Suman and Sumit Kumar on the right. The central area shows a white map of Bihar against a backdrop of a white building, with a purple lightning bolt striking the map. Throughout the sequence, a red header reads "नीतीश को तेजस्वी की 'सीधी धमकी'" and the "NEWS 18 इंडिया" logo is visible in the top right. A red ticker at the bottom states "PM: बिहार के लोगों की आकांक्षाएँ पूरी होंगी" with a timestamp of "10:04 PM". Between frames, text overlays appear and disappear over the map of Bihar; first, the phrase "सुशासन पर चैलेंज" appears, and later, it is replaced by "खेला का इशारा". The people in the portraits remain static, wearing traditional white Indian attire.
